title: tripleurospermum maritimum var. agreste
intro: Tripleurospermum maritimum var. agreste, also known as Sea-hawk's-wing or Sea Mayweed, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. In herbal preparations, Sea-hawk's-wing is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can also be used as a poultice or salve to apply directly to affected areas.
